title: Trump Says Iran Proposal Isn’t Enough to Stop Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants

title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
summary: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.

title: Artemis II Astronauts Name Moon Crater After Carroll, Reid Wiseman’s Late Wife
summary: The crew shared an emotional moment with mission control and the family of Reid Wiseman, whose wife, Carroll, died in 2020, on the ground in Houston.

title: Vance to Visit Hungary to Boost Orban Before Election
summary: A scheduled visit by the American vice president, JD Vance, makes clear that Russia is not the only country invested in a victory for Hungary’s leader, Viktor Orban.

title: Why Hungary’s Election Could Swing on Roma Votes
summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s policies affecting the Roma minority have put those voters in play in upcoming parliamentary elections. In a tight race, they could make the difference.

title: In Paris’s Catacombs, Can a Restoration Breathe New Life Into City’s Dead?
summary: For centuries, the bones of some six million people were buried in the catacombs beneath the city. Curators are trying to preserve and modernize the tunnels while maintaining the spooky ambience.

title: Trump Administration Pulls Out of Civil Rights Settlements Backing Trans Students
summary: The Education Department said there was no precedent for the federal government terminating settlements stemming from civil rights investigations into schools.

summary: Stephen K. Bannon, a former close aide to President Trump, was convicted for failing to comply with a congressional subpoena related to the investigation into the Jan. 6 attack.

summary: The new tax-sheltered savings and investment accounts will start accepting deposits this summer.

summary: As deadlines approach in the next two weeks, neither is going quite according to the partisan plan.

title: The California Lake Billed as the ‘Saudi Arabia of Lithium’

summary: Companies are scrambling to deal with the glut.

title: A.I. Is on Its Way to Upending Cybersecurity
summary: With new systems from companies like Anthropic and OpenAI, hackers can attack with greater speed. The defense is more A.I.

title: Whale That Swam 20 Miles Up Washington River Is Found Dead
summary: The gray whale, which some locals affectionately named Willapa Willy, was found on Saturday afternoon after first being spotted swimming up the Willapa River last week.

title: Elisabeth Waldo Dies at 107; Fused Indigenous and Western Music
summary: A classically-trained violinist, she incorporated traditional instruments native to Latin America in Western-style scores to create an atmospheric hybrid.

title: Mamdani Celebrates Passover at Progressive ‘Seder in the Street’
